name: ghostchat-monorepo
description: GhostChat - Secure end-to-end encrypted ephemeral chat

scripts.dev: npm run dev -w packages/backend & npm run dev -w packages/frontend
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/backend && npm run build -w packages/frontend
scripts.test: npm test -w packages/backend && npm test -w packages/frontend

author: GhostChat
